hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] || [ ! -f "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.md|*.yaml|*.yml) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx prettier --write "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uvx ruff format "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; exit 0
